Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT
AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO LOCAL GOVERNMENT
COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Authorizes the Hicksville Water District to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes the Hicksville Water District to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the Hicksville Water District to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
